title: oleandra neriiformis var. hirta
intro: Oleandra neriiformis var. hirta, also known as the hirta fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oleandra neriiformis var. hirta include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used for its medicinal purposes.
